how this works
a quick note before we begin ✦
①
pick your dishes
browse our menu and circle the things that make you feel good. walks, tea, art, naps — whatever fills your cup.
✦
②
we'll serve you daily
each morning, we pick a few items from your menu — a little sampler plate for the day.
✦
③
check 'em off
did the thing? tap it. that's it. no streaks, no guilt, no "you missed a day!" nonsense.
✦
④
add your own
your menu, your rules. add anything that gives you a boost — even if it's "sit in the car alone for 10 minutes."
"the only rule: no wrong answers."
let's build your menu →
